ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the university is located */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the university */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the university (e.g., public, private) */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment of the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_universities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university being ranked */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the university */,
  "early_career_pay" INTEGER /* Average early career pay for graduates */,
  "mid_career_pay" INTEGER /* Average mid-career pay for graduates */,
  "make_world_better_percent" INTEGER /* Percentage of graduates contributing to societal improvement */,
  "stem_percent" INTEGER /* Percentage of graduates in STEM fields */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "ranking_source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking (e.g., US News, Forbes) */,
  "ranking_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the ranking (e.g., academic reputation, job placement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, guest) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_ranking_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_id") REFERENCES rankings ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alumni_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university the alumnus graduated from */,
  "year_graduated" INTEGER /* Year the alumnus graduated */,
  "current_position" TEXT /* Current position of the alumnus */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Current salary of the alumnus */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Satisfaction rating of the alumnus with their university experience */,
  "make_world_better" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alumnus is contributing to societal improvement */,
  "stem_field" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alumnus is in a STEM field */,
  "would_recommend" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alumnus would recommend their university */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the alumnus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alumni_feedback_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "early_career_pay" INTEGER /* Average early career pay for graduates */,
  "mid_career_pay" INTEGER /* Average mid-career pay for graduates */,
  "make_world_better_percent" INTEGER /* Percentage of graduates contributing to societal improvement */,
  "stem_percent" INTEGER /* Percentage of graduates in STEM fields */,
  "tuition_fees" INTEGER /* Tuition fees for the university */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university offering the degree */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study for the degree */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Level of the degree (e.g., bachelor's, master's) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university where the faculty member is employed */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the faculty member (e.g., professor, associate professor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the faculty member is employed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)
